title: pteris cadieri subsp. cadieri
intro: Pteris cadieri subsp. cadieri, also known as the Chinese brake fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Pteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to reduce pain and swelling, as well as prevent infection. The health benefits of Pteris cadieri subsp. cadieri include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. Pteris cadieri subsp. cadieri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
